

::: {.border}

{{< video https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/kfv8lhtfibn2thsotm1h4/video1.mp4?rlkey=yt1ifx6oy9unf7mrim28bqk1u&dl=1 
    title='Google Colab and Python Basics' 
>}}

**Google Colab and Python Basics**

:::

::: {.border}

{{< video https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/NMIRxSKmS6ydodbXaB6esbcDclijBiLVKdcGeJfnNBI0rX4KHX1o44dAZdgsYnct.cYyajHRtfB4vEFl_?startTime=1741901609000
Passcode: %=v1=YrK 
    title='Google Colab and Python Basics' 
>}}

Data Analysis with Pandas

:::

::: {.border}

{{< video https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/tffkugxj8pjf5uxo81y77/test.mp4?rlkey=ogjflq7he8kexi139vx2eme9g&dl=1 
    title='Plotting in Python' 
>}}

Plotting in Python

:::

::: {.border}

{{< video https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/tffkugxj8pjf5uxo81y77/test.mp4?rlkey=ogjflq7he8kexi139vx2eme9g&dl=1 
    title='Using APIs of LLMs' 
>}}

Using APIs of LLMs

:::

::: {.border}

{{< video https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/kfv8lhtfibn2thsotm1h4/test.mp4?rlkey=ogjflq7he8kexi139vx2eme9g&dl=1 
    title='JupyterLab, VS Code, and Cursor' 
>}}

JupyterLab, VS Code, and Cursor

:::




::: {.border}

{{< video https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/tffkugxj8pjf5uxo81y77/test.mp4?rlkey=ogjflq7he8kexi139vx2eme9g&dl=1 
    title='Streamlit Apps' 
>}}

Streamlit Apps
:::
